content.query:
SELECT          DISTINCT C.customer as [Customer ID]
,               C.name as [Customer Name]
,               oh.name as [Sub Name]
,               OH.[order] as [Order Number]
,               OH.delivery_date as [Req Delivery Date]
,               OL.item as [Item Number]
,               OL.descr as [Item Description]
,               OL.q_ord as [Order Quantity]
,               OL.price as [Unit Price]
,               OL.q_ord*OL.price as [Total Price]
FROM            ADC.oe_head OH
JOIN            ADC.oe_line OL on OH.[order] = OL.[order]
JOIN            ADC.customer C on OH.customer = C.customer
WHERE           OH.company_oe = 'AD' and C.company_cu = 'AD'
AND             delivery_date >= '2021-01-01'
AND             upper(oh.name) like '%AMAZON%'
